calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption; Ntc Of Oppos
Off Calendar Sep-18-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Katty S. Moy's Hearing On Claim Of Exemption is Off calendar as moot. The Sheriff informed the court that the levy was terminated and the funds were returned to a third party because plaintiff did not oppose the third party's claim. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/ehg
